self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can retain this bounded Architecture result as a product-owned adoption boundary instead of forcing the next slice to reconstruct prior evidence by hand.
self_improvement.mechanism: The adopted planned-next artifact and paired decision JSON materialize the bounded result into Directive-owned Architecture form.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: The bounded result existed, but the operator still had to decide and restate how to carry it forward into the next Architecture materialization step.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Future Architecture continuation can start from an explicit adopted artifact and decision envelope rather than re-reading the full result chain.

decision.rationale: The bounded result is explicitly adopted as current-scope Directive-owned Architecture output.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
